import React from 'react' import { Video } from '../types/Video' const formatViews = (num: number) => { if (num >= 1_000_000) return (num / 1_000_000).toFixed(1).replace(/\.0$/, '') + 'M' if (num >= 1_000) return (num / 1_000).toFixed(1).replace(/\.0$/, '') + 'K' return String(num) } const IconLike = ({ filled }: { filled?: boolean }) => ( ) const IconSave = ({ filled }: { filled?: boolean }) => ( ) const IconClock = () => ( ) type Props = { video: Video isLiked?: boolean isSaved?: boolean onLike?: () => void onSave?: () => void onClick?: () => void variant?: 'grid' | 'list' | 'compact' active?: boolean } const VideoItem: React.FC = ({ video, isLiked, isSaved, onLike, onSave, onClick, variant = 'grid', active }) => { const containerBase = 'rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-white shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition cursor-pointer' const thumb = (

) const meta = (

{video.channel} • {formatViews(video.views)} views
) if (variant === 'list' || variant === 'compact') { return (

files.src/types/Video.ts:
export type Video = {
  id: string
  title: string
  channel: string
  channelAvatar: string
  views: number
  likes: number
  duration: string
  category: string
  publishedAt: string
  description: string
  thumbnail: string
  source: string
  tags?: string[]
}
